    "IsA": [
      "それは協力型ボードゲームです。"
    ],
    "HasA": [
      "それはハントフェーズを持っています。",
      "それはショダウンフェーズを持っています。",
      "それはセトルメントフェーズを持っています。",
      "それはフィナーレを持っています。",

      "それは地形タイルを持っています。",
      "それはギアカードを持っています。",
      "それはセトルメントイベントを持っています。"
    ],
    "HasFeatureOf": [
      "それは協力的なゲームプレイを特徴としています。",
      "それはプレイヤーが獲物を選択するハントフェーズを特徴としています。",
      "それはプレイヤーがモンスターに直面するショダウンフェーズを特徴としています。",
      "それはクラフトとアップグレードのためのセトルメントフェーズを特徴としています。",
      "それは勝利または敗北を決定するフィナーレを特徴としています。",
      "それは新しいモンスターとギアを追加する拡張機能を特徴としています。",
      "それは急な学習曲線によって特徴づけられます。",
      "それは高い生産品質によって特徴づけられます。",
      "それはブティックボードゲームとしての地位を特徴としています。",
      "それは高価格によって特徴づけられます。"
    ],
    "UsedFor": [
      "それは協力型ボードゲームに使用されます。",
      "それは獲物を狩るために使用されます。",
      "それはショダウンでモンスターに直面するために使用されます。",
      "それは新しいギアを作成するために使用されます。",
      "それは新しい能力を発見するために使用されます。",
      "それは入植地をアップグレードするために使用されます。",
      "それは約30ランタン年を生き残るために使用されます。",
      "それは4人用協力アドベンチャーに使用されます。"

    ],

      "不明"

      "それはミニチュアの使用というコンセプトから生まれました。",

      "それは「キングダム・デス」の設定から生まれました。"

      "不明"
    ],
    "FoundedIn": [
      "不明"
    ],

      "それは樹脂でのフィギュアの大量生産のためにヨーロッパのアーティストによって製造されました。"

      "それは入植地の人口に影響します。",

      "それはイベントカード、キャラクターフィギュア、モンスターフィギュアで構成されています。",

IsA: It is a cooperative board game.
HasA: It has a Hunt Phase.
It has a Showdown Phase.
It has a Settlement Phase.
It has a Finale.
It has expansions.
It has AI cards.
It has Hit Location cards.
It has terrain tiles.
It has Gear cards.
It has Settlement Events.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by cooperative gameplay.
It is characterized by a hunt phase where players select a quarry.
It is characterized by a showdown phase where players face a monster.
It is characterized by a settlement phase for crafting and upgrades.
It is characterized by a finale that determines victory or defeat.
It is characterized by expansions that add new monsters and gear.
It is characterized by a steep learning curve.
It is characterized by high production quality.
It is characterized by a boutique board game status.
It is characterized by a high cost.
UsedFor: It is used for cooperative board gaming.
It is used for hunting quarries.
It is used for facing monsters in showdowns.
It is used for crafting new gear.
It is used for discovering new abilities.
It is used for upgrading settlements.
It is used for surviving approximately 30 lantern years.
It is used for a four-player co-op adventure.
OriginatedIn: It originated in the idea of improving existing role-playing game gameplay systems.
It originated in the concept of using miniatures.
It originated in the mind of Adam Poots while awaiting jury duty.
It originated in the "Kingdom Death" setting.
CreatedBy: It was created by Adam Poots.
DevelopedBy: It was developed by Adam Poots.
It was developed by Adam Poots and his team.
ProducedBy: It was produced by 3D printing for figurines.
It was produced by a European artist for mass production of figures in resin.
Affects: It affects the game's progression through lantern years.
It affects the difficulty of encounters.
It affects the rewards gained by players.
ConsistsOf: It consists of a Hunt Phase, Showdown Phase, and Settlement Phase.
It consists of event cards, character figures, and monster figures.
It consists of AI cards and Hit Location cards for monsters.
It consists of Gear cards and Settlement cards.
It consists of Endeavors as a settlement-specific currency.
It consists of Settlement Locations depicted by a deck of cards.
It consists of core game mechanics and new content from expansions.
It consists of rulebooks detailing integration and special rules for expansions.
KnownFor: It is known for its high cost.
It is known for its quality of production.
It is known for being a boutique board game.
It is known for its brutal gameplay.
It is known for its long estimated playing time.
It is known for its cooperative adventure.
It is known for its steep learning curve.
It is known for its extensive expansions.
It is known for its successful Kickstarter campaigns.
It is known for its unique miniatures.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with Adam Poots.
It is associated with the "Kingdom Death" setting.
It is associated with HeroQuest.
It is associated with Warhammer Quest.
It is associated with Kickstarter campaigns.
It is associated with web browser-based applications.
It is associated with iOS app development.
It is associated with licensed crossovers from Pathfinder.
It is associated with licensed crossovers from Hyper Light Drifter.
It is associated with American Thanksgiving holiday weekend.
About: It is about cooperative board gaming.
It is about surviving a settlement.
It is about crafting gear and developing abilities.
It is about facing powerful creatures in a finale.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by Warhammer Quest.
It was influenced by existing role-playing game rulebooks.
